samples.xml_description:
Implement an 8-bit multiplier based on shifting and adding. 8-bit input operand A (multiplicand). 8-bit input operand B (multiplier). 16-bit output product. LOGIC_ZERO LOGIC_ONE

Initialize

product

to zero.

0 9 if else multiplier[ product

[

] = product

[

] + multiplicand[

];

 multiplier shift

      |                                 ^
%Warning-WIDTH: multi_8bit.v:29:47: Bit extraction of array[7:0] requires 3 bit index, not 4 bits.

      |                                               ^
